visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene begins in a brightly lit indoor studio with a white table in the foreground. Two women, one in a pink t-shirt and the other in a cream-colored dress, are standing behind the table. A third woman sits in the background at a wooden table using a phone. The woman in pink leans in to whisper into the ear of the woman in the cream dress, while colorful graphic symbols representing speech appear above them. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of the woman who was in the background. She is wearing a black shirt and holding a large grey tumbler. She smiles and gestures with the cup while yellow and white text overlays appear on the screen. (3) A series of close-up product shots follow, showcasing the tumbler against a white tiled background. Hands are shown comparing two different sizes of the cup, pointing to the seamless round bottom, and demonstrating how a hand can fit inside for cleaning. (4) The women are shown together again, holding different versions of the cup with various lid attachments. They demonstrate the interchangeable nature of the lids, including a straw lid, a flip lid, and one with a large handle. (5) A man in a yellow t-shirt is shown walking through a doorway and later outdoors, using the flip-lid version of the grey cup. (6) The video concludes with the two main women holding up the tumblers and a grey silicone ring, smiling and waving at the camera while large promotional text appears at the bottom.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 欸欸欸. (2) [Subtitle]: 你看他. (3) [Variety]: !@#$*. (4) [Subtitle]: 你說什麼? 我聽不到. (5) [Subtitle]: 什麼? 大聲一點. [Subtitle]: 聽不到啦. (6) [Subtitle]: 他是說現在. [Slogan]: WOKY 渾圓杯 升級到第三代了. (7) [Slogan]: 不僅容量加大升級. [Slogan]: 770ml >>> 800ml. (8) [Slogan]: 升級一體成型 圓底杯身. (9) [Slogan]: 無縫無死角 一體成型圓底. (10) [Slogan]: 綠色不鏽鋼. [Slogan]: 製程到選料 更替地球著想. (11) [Slogan]: 內層升級抑菌塗料. [Slogan]: 鋅離子 不容易沾色卡味. (12) [Slogan]: 不怕把細菌喝進去肚子裡. (13) [Subtitle]: 它這次呢 還直接開外掛. (14) [Slogan]: MOZU 全新系統 可以自由的變換上蓋. (15) [Slogan]: 經典蓋. (16) [Variety]: 單手開. [Variety]: 隱藏提手. (17) [Slogan]: 吸管蓋. (18) [Slogan]: 翻吸蓋. (19) [Variety]: 圓環提手設計 空間夠大. (20) [Variety]: 有終生保固喔!. (21) [Variety]: 現在嘖嘖募資中!. (22) [Slogan]: 最低只要 $999 就能帶回家.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 female assistant/character, 1 male actor in cutaways.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long brown hair and wears a pink t-shirt; the other has long black wavy hair with a butterfly tattoo on her arm, wearing a cream dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A studio with white walls and a white table, a kitchen with white tiles, and a brief outdoor street shot.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a bright, mid-tempo acoustic guitar strumming pattern accompanied by a light, steady drum beat. A female voice is heard whispering softly, followed by another female voice complaining loudly with a playful, high-pitched tone about not being able to hear. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' transition sound effect triggers as a third female voice begins a professional and energetic product narration. She speaks quickly with clear articulation over the continuous upbeat BGM. (3) A 'ding' sound effect highlights the mention of a specific brand and version number. The narration continues with high arousal, detailing technical specifications and benefits of a container. (4) Short, percussive sound effects like 'pops' and 'clicks' are layered over the mix to accentuate the visual cuts showing product features. A male voiceover occasionally interjects with a friendly, supportive tone to describe specific lid functions. (5) The mix remains dense with overlapping speech and music. A soft splashing sound is briefly heard alongside the narration. (6) The video ends with a collective cheerful exclamation from the female speakers, followed by a final rhythmic guitar chord as the BGM fades out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Intro -> Feature Breakdown -> Price/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the third generation of the WOKY Hunyuan Cup by demonstrating its improved capacity, cleaning convenience, antibacterial properties, and highly versatile interchangeable lid system.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is entirely focused on demonstrating the features and pricing of the WOKY cup, with brand names and logos clearly visible throughout.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a classic social media marketing format with a humorous hook and fast-paced editing to maintain engagement during product specs.
